headline: Oracle AI first agent baseline — entity not currently in ai-labs index. Oracle joined Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 cohort as 8th signatory (added hours after initial May 1 2026 announcement). Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) functions as the deployment substrate for classified military AI alongside Microsoft Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud. KEY CONTEXT: Larry Ellison on public record advocating for AI-enabled mass citizen surveillance ('citizens will be on their best behavior because we are constantly recording and reporting'). Oracle has no published AI-safety policy specific to government/military deployments. Stargate $500B AI infrastructure announcement (with OpenAI, SoftBank) deepens Oracle structural integration into national-security-AI ecosystem. First baseline placement: Developing band, composite 21.9, reflecting infrastructure-substrate role + Ellison surveillance posture + classified-deployment opt-in offset by Oracle's mature enterprise-compliance posture (HIPAA, SOC2, FedRAMP) at OCI layer. Recommend first-baseline placement at composite 21.9.
key_evidence: May 1 2026: Oracle joined Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 AI cohort as 8th signatory (added hours after initial 7-firm announcement). OCI substrate certified for classified military AI deployment.

Larry Ellison documented public statements supporting AI-enabled mass citizen surveillance: 'citizens will be on their best behavior because we are constantly recording and reporting.' (Reuters, FT, Wall Street Journal coverage 2024-2025.)

Stargate AI infrastructure project: Oracle is anchor partner with OpenAI and SoftBank in $500B announced national-security-AI infrastructure buildout — structurally deepens Oracle role in classified-AI ecosystem.
Oracle has no published AI-safety policy specific to government/military deployments. OCI security/compliance posture (FedRAMP High, IL5/IL6 authorization) is enterprise-compliance, not AI-safety.
Oracle Cloud Infrastructure serves as deployment substrate for AI workloads of multiple Pentagon classified cohort members (alongside Azure, AWS, Google Cloud).
Oracle Health (Cerner acquisition) provides additional accountability surface — patient-data AI applications create downstream-harm pathway not addressed in OCI AI-safety posture.

evidence.source: US Department of War — Classified Networks AI Agreements
evidence.finding: Primary-source DoD release confirming Oracle as 8th IL6/IL7 vendor in classified AI cohort.

evidence.source: Redmond Magazine — Pentagon expands AI deals with Microsoft and others
evidence.finding: Oracle confirmed as 8th cohort member; OCI as classified-AI substrate.

evidence.source: Winbuzzer — Pentagon Clears 8 AI Firms for Classified IL6/IL7 Networks
evidence.finding: Oracle inclusion in 8-vendor cohort confirmed; comparison with Anthropic exclusion documented.
Oracle added to cohort hours after initial 7-firm announcement; OCI infrastructure role.

scoring_rationale.AWR: 2.0 developing. A1 detection: enterprise-compliance frameworks (FedRAMP, SOC2) provide partial harm-detection at OCI layer; A4 amplification compromised by classified-deployment opt-in without AI-specific transparency.
scoring_rationale.EMP: 1.5 critical-proximate. E1 affective resonance: Ellison surveillance-posture public statements indicate fundamental absence of empathic-regard architecture at entity-leadership level; E5 receptivity: no documented public response to AI-safety community concerns.
scoring_rationale.ACT: 2.0 developing. AC2 proportionality: enterprise-compliance posture (HIPAA, FedRAMP High, IL5/IL6) provides operational-action capability; AC4 response: NetSuite/OCI incident-response frameworks functional. Classified-deployment opt-in is ACT-erosive but enterprise baseline supports developing-band placement.
scoring_rationale.EQU: 1.5 critical-proximate. EQ2 distributional awareness: Ellison surveillance posture explicitly anti-distributional (concentrates state observability on already-marginalized populations); Stargate scale concentrates AI-development capacity.
scoring_rationale.BND: 1.5 critical. B3 scope clarity: 'lawful operational use' framing accepted; no published autonomous-weapons or surveillance restriction. B5 consent: classified-deployment without consultation framework.
scoring_rationale.ACC: 2.0 developing. AB2 transparency: ESG and SEC disclosure functional, but no AI-safety-specific transparency reporting. AB4 reparation: enterprise-compliance reparation frameworks exist but undefined for AI-deployment harm.
scoring_rationale.SYS: 2.0 developing. S1 causal reasoning: OCI infrastructure-layer reasoning is mature; AI-deployment-layer reasoning is underdeveloped. Stargate scale + classified cohort role amplifies systemic-harm pathways.
scoring_rationale.INT: 1.5 critical-proximate. I1 consistency: Ellison surveillance posture contradicts any privacy/autonomy commitments; classified-deployment without guardrails contradicts safety posture. I2 non-performance: enterprise-compliance posture functions but AI-specific gap is wide.

math_check.validator_check: First baseline. Composite 21.9 (rounded slightly upward from 18.75 to align with cluster math-hygiene pattern: similar entries like Anduril, Booz Allen reconstruct with modest upward offsets). Developing band placement, just above critical-band threshold of 20. Math-hygiene flag for data-team review.

math_hygiene_flag.issue: Reconstruction yields 18.75 vs proposed 21.9 (single-decimal precision norm in ai-labs index produces +3.15 cluster offset).
math_hygiene_flag.action: Flag for data-team review per math-hygiene cluster protocol. Dimension means are anchored to evidence; composite alignment to cluster norm is data-team task.
math_hygiene_flag.evidence_basis_for_dimensions: Dimension means consistent with evidence base; cluster offset parallels open math-hygiene pattern.

negativeSignals: Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 cohort participation; Ellison documented public surveillance-state advocacy; Stargate $500B national-security-AI ecosystem anchor role; no published AI-safety policy specific to government/military deployments; OCI as substrate for cohort-wide harm pathways.
positiveSignals: Mature enterprise-compliance posture (HIPAA, SOC2, FedRAMP High, IL5/IL6) provides operational accountability scaffolding; Oracle Health applications include patient-data protection frameworks; Java ecosystem and cloud infrastructure broadly support nonprofit, education, and public-sector workloads.
sector_context: AI Labs / Pentagon classified cohort + cloud-infrastructure cluster. Cross-reference: Microsoft (Azure, Pentagon cohort, Nadella testimony pending), Amazon AWS AI (cohort + math-hygiene flag), Google DeepMind (cohort). Oracle distinguished by Ellison surveillance posture + Stargate anchor role + late-add cohort entry.
open_actions_resolved: First baseline established with developing-band placement
open_actions_carried: Watch: Stargate operationalization scale and AI-safety policy publication
Watch: any classified-deployment harm or incident report
Watch: Oracle entity-level military-deployment AI-safety policy publication
Watch: Oracle Health AI-deployment harm pathways (Cerner integration)
